title: Rogue Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rogue Squadron''' can refer to:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*'''[[Rogue Squadron]]''', the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[starfighter]] [[squadron]]

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'''==
*'''[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]''', the legendary starfighter unit formed after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]
*'''[[Rogue Squadron crest]]''', the insignia of the starfighter unit
*'''[[Rogue Squadron Headquarters]]''', the headquarters of the starfighter unit
*'''[[Rogue Squadron Base]]''', a base of operations used by the starfighter unit
*'''[[Ersatz Rogue Squadron]]''' a replacement of the original starfighter unit led by [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]]

=='''[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]'''==
*'''[[Rogue Squadron (film)|''Rogue Squadron'']]''', an upcoming film directed by [[Patty Jenkins]]
*The '''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (series)|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron]]''''' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series, consisting of:
**'''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]''', a [[1998]] video game for [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] and [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]]
***'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''''', a guidebook for the video game
**'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''''', a [[2001]] video game for [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]]
***'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''''', a guidebook for the video game
***'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]''''', a guidebook for the video game
**'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''''', a [[2003]] video game for Nintendo GameCube
***'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''''', a guidebook for the video game
***'''''[[Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]''''', a guidebook for the video game
**'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Leaders: Rogue Squadron Wii]]''''', a canceled video game for the [[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]]
**'''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: X-Wing vs. Tie Fighter]]''''', a canceled video game for the Wii
*'''''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''''', a series of comics that take place shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*'''''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''''', the first novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'' series]], by [[Michael A. Stackpole]]
**[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (abridged audiobook)|'''''X-Wing: Rogue Squadron'' abridged audiobook''']], the abridged audiobook adaptation of the novel
**[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)|'''''X-Wing: Rogue Squadron'' unabridged audiobook''']], the unabridged audiobook adaptation of the novel
*'''''[[The X-Wing: Rogue Squadron Sourcebook]]''''', a canceled sourcebook book by [[West End Games]]
*"'''[[The Adventures of Rogue Squadron]]'''," an interview conducted by [[Ilene Rosenberg]]
*'''[[Rogue Squadron Main Title]]''', a musical piece composed by [[Chris Hülsbeck]]
*"'''[[Who's Who in Rogue Squadron]]'''," an article published in [[Star Wars Insider 59|''Star Wars Insider'' 59]]

=='''See also'''==
*[[Rogue Leader (disambiguation)]]
*[[Rogue One (disambiguation)]]
